overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western-themed video game. The player character, wearing a long coat and hat, walks through a rural town at night along dirt roads, passing wooden houses with warm lantern light, and approaches a large plantation house. The scene features high-quality atmospheric rendering with detailed lighting and textures.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road entering a small Western town

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dirt road toward the town, passing a wooden cart on the left side

entered.detail: old wooden wagon with large wheels sitting beside the road
unpaved reddish dirt road stretching through the town
weathered wooden picket fence lining the right side of the road
tall mature tree with dense foliage on the left side
two-story white wooden house with illuminated windows and a front porch
tall wooden pole with a warm glowing lantern

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark night in a rural Western town. The camera follows the character walking down a dirt road, passing a wooden cart on the left. A large white house with glowing windows becomes visible ahead, while a wooden fence and street lamp line the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: town street with wooden houses and street lighting

events.description: character walks past the large white house on the right side
passing a horse tethered near a fence on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing down the road past the white house and approaching a horse tied near the fence

notable_agents.action: horse standing tethered to a wooden post, stationary and facing the road

entered.detail: dark-colored horse standing near a hitching post with saddle

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the large white house on the right, which recedes into the background. A horse stands tethered near a fence on the right side of the road. The dirt road continues through the town, lined with wooden fences and illuminated by warm street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching a large plantation house with lit windows

events.description: character turns left off the main road toward the large dark building
approaching the entrance of the large two-story building with illuminated porch

agents.ego_description: turning left off the main road and walking toward the large dark building with multiple lit windows

entered.detail: large two-story dark wooden building with multiple illuminated windows and a wide porch
small wooden outbuilding visible in the distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The character turns left away from the main road, leaving the white house and horse behind. They walk toward a large, dark wooden building that dominates the view ahead. The building features multiple glowing windows and a welcoming porch light as the character approaches the entrance across a grassy yard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet Western town at night, transitioning from a main thoroughfare to the entrance of a secluded wooden estate. It begins by following the character down a dark dirt road past a wooden cart, with a large white house and glowing street lamps emerging in the distance. As the character advances, the white house recedes into the background on the right, passing a tethered horse and a line of wooden fences illuminated by warm light. The scene then shifts as the character turns left away from the main road, leaving the town center behind to cross a grassy yard. Finally, the camera pushes forward toward a large, dark wooden building that dominates the view, drawing closer to its glowing windows and welcoming porch light.
